Alright, welcome to team training. This is going to be a really exciting course that is designed to teach you how to hire the right team for your gym and how to train them and what systems they'll be using. So, super exciting. Let's dive into the overview of team training. So this course will help you scale your gyms and anticipate the bottlenecks before they happen based on the best practices that we have seen over the years. So, as you scale, you will need new fulfillment systems, new retention systems, and additional staff. So, what you do to retain and fulfill 100 members is going to be a lot different to do the same thing with 500 members. You'll need different staff based on the volume. You'll need to run that staff. You'll need to run different systems because some of the manual systems that you can do, like texting somebody from your phone when you have 50 members, is really hard to do with you. You have 500 members. So, we will go through this entire course. We'll go through how to do those things at different levels and what your staff should be doing. So, we will cover who you should have staffed based on your member count. That is typically what will differentiate how many staff members you need is just how many people you have to service. When to hire and how to train that staff and how to run the systems that your staff will use. So, that is the overview of the team training. And without further ado, we will jump into the specific training based on your membership count.
